MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Scott Johnson, Esq. of Lewis, Brisbois, Bisgaard & Smith , 415-362-2580 for defendant and moving party Douglas N. Akay dba Akay Assoc.
Daniel Byre, Esq. , 415-865-0376 for plaintiff and opposing party Laborers International Union of North America.

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
DEFENDANT AKAY & ASSOCIATES, DOUGLAS AKAY'S Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Contract; Request For Judicial Notice; Declarations Of Scott L. Johnson And Douglas N. Akay In Support IS GRANTED WITHOUT PRJEUDICE TO THE ARBITRATOR DECIDING THAT PARTS OF THE DISPUTE IS NOT SUBJECT TO ARBITRATION AND REMAND IT BACK TO THE COURT. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MADE A DISCLOSURE IN COURT. Prevailing party to submit form of order.
JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR#: 1558. (302/AJR/KD)
